title: 22m Satin Ribbon, Navy Blue, 20mm, Fine Gift Wrapping, Bouquet Wedding, Sewing, Bows, Christmas, Crafts, Cars, Cakes, Home Decor
features: 🎀「Material」-100% polyester,smooth & silk surface without wrinkles，satin ribbon is constructed of density weave, very well made without fraying ends or loosing strings anywhere.

🎀「Color」-Our solid ribbons come in 18 popular colors, including red, black, champagne, coffee, sky blue, dark green, pink, etc.To meet your needs in various occasions. Machine washable with no color facade, even works well outside in rain or sunshine.
🎀「Size」-We package 1 roll of ribbon with a width of 20mm and a total length of 22m. Quantity can meet your daily needs well.
🎀「Packaging」-We use plastic sealed packaging to prevent the ribbon from getting dirty and wrinkled, ensuring that you receive a brand new product with wrinkles.

🎀「Versatility」-Ideal for various occasions such as wedding invitations, dress sayings, bridal bouquets, sewing, corset fading, party embellishments, gift wrapping, hair accessories, home decor, DIY crafts, wedding embellishments, and so on. It smooth texture and clean color add a lustrous touch that goes well with all kinds of wrapping paper no matter you tie a simple bow or get creative with the design, this ribbon makes every gift look more special.
